title: PogwOriginsSMP
description: a generic OriginsSMP modpack that adds New Origins, New Mods, QoL fixes & etc. The modpack logo was by EmZ & Aric3435.
body:
# About Welcome to the PogwOriginsSMP Modpack! This modpack is designed to enhance your Minecraft Origins experience by adding over 40 Origins for you to choose from. Embark on an epic adventure with your friends, having the unique powers of your chosen Origin to explore and have fun in the world. Whether you’re delving into battling foes, or building structures, the possibilities are endless. Mod Pack Icon was made by: EmZ & Aric3435 [](https://legacy.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/pogworiginssmp-modpack) # Credits [Architectury API (Fabric/Forge/NeoForge)](https://modrinth.com/mod/architectury-api) - shedaniel
